title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CM-4
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CM-4 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CM-4 in the Configuration Management family. The control title for CM-4 is Impact Analyses. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: RA-1 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, RA-1, belongs to the Risk Assessment family and is titled Risk Assessment Policy and Procedures. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
